name: Battle of Aleppo begins
detail: Gunfire breaks out between rebels and security forces in Salaheddine district, southwest Aleppo; three days later rebel fighters converge on and penetrate the city.

name: Rebels capture Tishrin Dam
detail: Rebels seize Tishrin Dam northeast of the city
source_note: cutting off nearly all remaining government supply routes into Aleppo.

name: Great Mosque of Aleppo (Umayyad Mosque) seized
detail: Rebels seize the Umayyad Mosque; during the fighting the mosque's museum catches fire and its ceiling collapses -- another historic Aleppo mosque damaged in the same conflict.

name: Old City / al-Hatab Square operation
detail: FSA and Ahrar ash-Sham launch an operation in the Old City and al-Hatab Square (Al-Jdayde district) using tunnel bombs; churches, a mosque, and the Waqf of Ibshir Mustafa Pasha complex are heavily damaged.

name: Siege of Aleppo Central Prison lifted
detail: Government forces lift the siege of Aleppo Central Prison after a two-year rebel encirclement.

name: Rebel shelling of government-held Aleppo
detail: Rebel shelling of government-held districts leaves 43 civilians dead and 190 wounded ahead of a new rebel offensive.

name: Russian airstrikes begin in Syria
detail: Russian warplanes carry out their first strikes in Syria, including against rebel positions in Aleppo.

name: Syrian Army north-west Aleppo offensive begins
detail: Syrian Army and allied forces begin an offensive aimed at cutting the Castello highway, the rebels' last supply route into the city.

name: Government offensive to retake eastern Aleppo begins
detail: Syrian government forces begin an offensive that takes 15-20% of the remaining rebel-held part of the city.

name: Only 5% of city remains rebel-held; ceasefire announced
detail: A ceasefire is announced to allow evacuation of civilians and rebels as government forces close in on the last rebel-held pocket.

name: Evacuation completed; Battle of Aleppo ends
detail: Evacuation of remaining civilians and rebels is completed; the Syrian Army declares full control of the city. Over the 4.5-year battle, the Violations Documentation Center recorded at least 31,273 deaths (19 Jul 2012 - 15 Dec 2016), 76% of them civilians.

name: Syrian government regains full control of Aleppo suburbs
detail: The Syrian Arab Army regains control of the last rebel-held Aleppo-city suburbs for the first time since 2012, as part of the wider Idlib/Aleppo offensive.

name: HTS-led offensive into Aleppo governorate begins
detail: Syrian opposition forces, led by Hay'at Tahrir al-Sham, launch a major offensive into western and southern Aleppo governorate.
source_note: Wikipedia: Northwestern Syria offensive (2024) / Battle of Aleppo (2024)

name: Rebel forces enter Aleppo city
detail: Opposition forces enter Aleppo city, the first rebel presence in Aleppo since the end of the 2012-2016 battle -- part of the offensive that would go on to topple the Assad government weeks later.
